title: thymophylla tenuiloba
intro: Thymophylla tenuiloba, also known as silverleaf, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thymophylla tenuiloba include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Thymophylla tenuiloba can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
